verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Whatever happened to till death do us part Does the home reflect the heart Parent’s faces tell of worried minds While children search but they can’t seem to find It’s time we took a closer look Got back to living by the Holy Book No compromise without getting slack, You see church we’ll go forward if we’ll just go back

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We’ll know the trees by the fruit we see Serving God has no in between We’re either cold or we’re hot He said in His word lukewarm shall have no part It’s coming down to in or out, While there’s no time for all this playing about We’re going back to lost or found, Church we’ve gotta go back, We’ve got to stand our ground

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We’ve got to go back to livin’ true, We’re going back to the absolute Back to where the church stands strong, Back to where there’s a right and there’s a wrong Back to where it’s black or white You see the difference it’s like day and night We’re going back to things above We’re going back to our first love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We’re gonna rise like a sleeping giant Standing tall in God’s strength and might All the power we’ve claimed for so long It has returned and we’ve been made strong We’re not looking to the right or to the left You see these eyes they’re spirit led We’re going to back to true or false Church we’ve got to go back to Calvary’s cross

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We’ve got to go back to livin’ true We’re going back to the absolute Back to where the church stands strong Back to where there’s a right and there’s a wrong Back to where it’s black or white You see the difference it’s like day and night We’re going back to things above We’re going back to our first love Our… first… love
